table-348-348.caption: Find all cards illustrated by Stephen Daniel and describe the text of the ruling of these cards. State if these cards have missing or degraded properties and values.
data: Original printing has no specific rule changes; functions as intended in Vintage format.
No errata exists for this card; it remains one of the most powerful draw spells ever printed.
Functions normally without additional restrictions from later rulings regarding timing windows.
No special interaction rules apply beyond its standard ability to tap for mana.
Standard functionality applies; no known bugs affect its colorless mana production capability.
No unique rulings exist; simply taps for two
